title: ジャパンCの後に・これが“アタシ”

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, City! You looked so beautiful on
the track!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: City! You're the most beautiful Umamusume ever! Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wow, they're crying. My running made them cry.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Did you give it your all?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Of course. Couldn't you tell by watching?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I ran and ran like hell, and now I'm here,
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: How do I look, in your eyes?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know what? I'm going to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what people say, or how they look at
me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm pretty, and no, I'm not going to stop
running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Because as long as I'm running, I'm being true to
myself!
